creator: kamil.choudhury@anserinae.net
text:
> https://www.virtualbox.org/browser/trunk/src/VBox/HostDrivers/Support/SUPR3HardenedMain.cpp?rev=39657#L312

Yup -- I actually asked freebsd-fs about the snippet in question: 

http://osdir.com/ml/freebsd-fs/2011-12/msg00067.html

Apparently there's a fix in the works, but not until after 9.0 is released. 

> ... you can disable this by passing "--disable-hardening" to configure
> or some similar kmk variable.

Will look into this.  

Thanks for investigating.
